title: そんなおかわり、いらないし！

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's it for the extra math class! I hope I
see better grades on the next quiz!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's finally over... That was the worst. My
shoulders are so stiff.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Gotta hurry back and get some rest. Yaaawn... Sooo sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Teacher B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Jordan! I'm giving an extra chemistry class
after this! You're coming today, okay?

text_block_list.name: Teacher C
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But she has an extra classics lesson with me
today... Oh well. Jordan, you'll just have to come
once you're finished with chemistry!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Are you guys for real?! Come on, you can't all just
decide to give me extra classes on a whim!
Seriously!

text_block_list.name: Teachers
text_block_list.text: Your test scores are what decided things!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The back-to-back extra classes may be a direct
consequence of Tosen Jordan's own actions, but
they still leave her feeling pretty down.
